text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon sings right up through<n>the last song.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phew. ☆ We did great! Everyone's<n>cleared out
already, huh?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes, but they all stayed until the<n>end! So if
you ask me—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know! It was a resounding<n>success!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I stuffed my singing full of feelings...<n>so I just
know they resonated with<n>someone.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we're just getting started! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hold on now, we haven't even said<n>hello!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tachyon. And Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hi, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I bring good news—fantastic, even!<n>You see,
Suzuka here was so moved,<n>she wishes to
cooperate with your<n>project!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Concerts hold the answer you seek.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, Suzuka has made up her mind!<n>She's ready
to work hard at her<n>lessons, starting tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, yesss! We're going to<n>have so much
fun, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: The concert really did bring more<n>people in...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
In other words, it... captured hearts.<n>With the
power of song!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though everyone may have their own<n>reasons for
joining, our first concert<n>did succeed in expanding
the team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we keep holding these concerts, we<n>should
hopefully be able to draw<n>more and more
supporters yet!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Something's malfunctioning. I sense...<n>an error.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I feel... strange.
